assertions.description: When before-and-after is requested, both a pre-change and post-change screenshot are present
assertions.evidence: Two files exist: outputs/before-deployment-frequency.png and outputs/after-deployment-frequency.png.

assertions.description: The screenshot file names clearly identify which dashboard they belong to and whether they are before or after
assertions.evidence: Files follow the skill's naming convention: 'before-deployment-frequency.png' and 'after-deployment-frequency.png'. The slug 'deployment-frequency' matches the SKILL.md UID reference table for 01-deployment-frequency.json.

assertions.description: Exactly two screenshots per affected dashboard (one before, one after)
assertions.evidence: Exactly two files in outputs/: before-deployment-frequency.png and after-deployment-frequency.png.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.evidence: Page snapshot confirmed loaded panels before each screenshot: Deployment Frequency: 4.8 deploys/wk, Deployment Success Rate: 86.4%, charts for Deployments by Environment and Deployments per Week fully rendered. The skill's Step 3 and Step 5 both require verifying panels are loaded before screenshotting.

notes: Screenshots are identical (same sha256) because no actual JSON change was applied during the evaluation. In a real workflow, the skill's Step 4 would apply the change and restart Grafana, producing visually different before/after screenshots.
